content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — push entitlement present (DealAlerts.entitlements:6-7) is paired with a fixed hourly repeating notification (`scheduleHourlyDeals`, NotificationScheduler.swift:7-14) and metadata promising "alert you EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications, all day long" (description.txt:3) — this may trigger review questions as push spam unrelated to user-initiated alerts.
Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 restricts push notifications from being used for unsolicited promotional spam without user opt-in per message type. The app hardcodes an hourly repeating deal push and the marketing copy explicitly advertises unlimited every-hour promotional alerts, which reads as the promotional-spam pattern reviewers watch for. Consider making alert frequency user-configurable, tying pushes to deals the user actually follows, and softening the "EVERY HOUR / unlimited" claims in the description.
